channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security - News On AIR
item.description: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security News On AIR

item.title: Railways staring at higher electricity costs after Supreme Court rules it qualifies as ‘consumer’
item.description: Indian Railways faces increased electricity costs following a Supreme Court ruling. The court declared the national transporter a "consumer" under the Electricity Act, making it liable for cross-subsidy and additional surcharges on open access power. This decision impacts the railways' operating ratio and power procurement expenses, overturning previous exemptions.

item.title: Maritime safety and security is of primordial importance to Indian Ocean Region: Secretary-General
item.description: Any disruption in the Indian Ocean will have a deep impact on the economy across the region, says Sanjiv Ranjan, Secretary-General of the Indian Ocean Rim Association; war in West Asia overshadows India’s agenda for IORA summit next year, marking 30 years of the grouping

item.title: ACME Solar Holdings Incorporates Four Wholly Owned Subsidiaries for Renewable Energy Development - India IPO
item.description: ACME Solar Holdings Incorporates Four Wholly Owned Subsidiaries for Renewable Energy Development India IPO

item.title: War breaking news. Netanyahu: 'It's not over, there's uranium to take away'. Trump: 'Sooner or later we will get it' - Il Sole 24 ORE
item.description: War breaking news. Netanyahu: 'It's not over, there's uranium to take away'. Trump: 'Sooner or later we will get it' Il Sole 24 ORE

item.title: ‘Bengal Poll Results Brought Relief Across India, Drew Global Attention’: PM Modi At Gujarat Rally
item.description: The Prime Minister said the reaction to the election result showed the unity of the country and the emotional connection people across states shared with Bengal.

item.title: Water System Hack Shows Potential, And Limits, of AI Attacks - BankInfoSecurity
item.description: Water System Hack Shows Potential, And Limits, of AI Attacks BankInfoSecurity

item.title: CPI Kerala State secretary Binoy Viswam criticises personality cults, reiterates CPI claim to Deputy Opposition Leader’s post
item.description: After the CPI national council meeting in New Delhi, Viswam describes the “unexpected” LDF defeat as a warning issued by the people

item.title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

item.title: Congress claims Instagram blocked Rahul Gandhi's reel and photo post featuring Vijay due to MeitY rules
item.description: Sources in the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology clarified that it had nothing to do with the action and it was because the platform’s internal system mistakenly flagged the post for blocking

item.title: Private capex surges 67% to ₹7.7 lakh crore: CII
item.description: India's private investment has seen a significant jump. This signals a strong revival in the country's investment cycle. Industry leaders are proposing measures to navigate global challenges. These include fuel excise duty adjustments and faster payments for small businesses. The focus is on converting this momentum into jobs and growth.

item.title: Hackers abuse Google ads, Claude.ai chats to push Mac malware
item.description: Attackers are abusing Google Ads and legitimate Claude.ai shared chats in an active malvertising campaign. Users searching for "Claude mac download" may come across sponsored search results that list claude.ai as the target website, but lead to instructions that install malware on their Mac. [...]

item.title: India negotiates EU market access for seafood exports: Piyush Goyal
item.description: India secured new opportunities for seafood exports by negotiating with the European Union. This move helped Indian exporters overcome significant challenges posed by steep US tariffs. The government's proactive approach ensured access to a large and stable market. This strategic action has led to export growth despite global uncertainties.

item.title: AAP holds protests against BJP over ED action against Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora
item.description: The AAP leaders and volunteers burnt effigies of the BJP-led Centre and raised slogans against it. They were also carrying placards which read 'ED-BJP gathjod murdabad'

item.title: 'Please speed up my returns': Rahul Gandhi's response to his 'BJP-supporter' financer wins internet
item.description: A mutual fund distributor, a long-time BJP supporter, shared how Rahul Gandhi maintained a professional relationship despite political differences. Gandhi humorously responded, urging faster investment returns. This light-hearted exchange garnered significant attention online, with many praising the civility and humor, while some questioned the professional ethics of revealing the client relationship.

item.title: Air India fired over 1,000 staff in 3 years for ethical breach, says airline CEO
item.description: Air India CEO also mentioned hundreds of staff who had misused the Employee Leisure Travel (ELT) system and added that such things should not happen.

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
item.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

item.title: O'Brien: Supreme Court Voting Rights Act Decision Likely Lead to "Redistricting War"
item.description: Bloomberg Opinion Senior Executive Editor Tim O'Brien joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to analyze the escalating tensions surrounding redistricting in the United States, particularly in light of recent Supreme Court rulings on the Voting Rights Act and decisions from the Virginia Supreme Court. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Amit Shah, Hardeep Puri Back PM Modi's Push For WFH, Reduced Fuel Usage Amid Iran War
item.description: PM Modi urged citizens to reduce fuel consumption, avoid purchasing gold and resume working from home as the US-Iran war roiled the global economy and disrupted supply chains.

item.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Focus on inflation, retail sales, US-Iran conflict, crude oil
item.description: Heavyweights including Cisco, Alibaba, and Applied Materials are set to disclose their quarterly financial performance in the week ahead

item.title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/10/2026
item.description: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Dr. Carlos Del Rio, Professor of Global Health and Epidemiology, Melissa Murray, Author of 'The US Constitution: A Comprehensive and Annotated Guide' and Former Law Clerk for Justice Sonia Sotomayor, Sara Albrecht, Chai

item.title: Hantavirus scare: Two Indians onboard MV Hondius ‘healthy and asymptomatic’, says Indian embassy in Spain
item.description: Hantavirus scare: The Indian embassy in Spain said the ambassador was in close contact with the Spanish authorities and the two Indian nationals (crew members).

item.title: Fervent and fake: High-glam AI avatars boost Trump ahead of midterms
item.description: Clad in swimsuits or military fatigues, the blonde women lavish praise on President Donald Trump and tear into his rivals -- but these influencers are AI-generated, flooding tech platforms with fervent political messaging ahead of the US midterm election.

item.title: 'Buy Indian, Choose Domestic Tourism': PM Modi Urges Citizens As Iran War Disrupts Global Economy
item.description: PM Modi suggested restarting 'Covid-era practices', such as working from home, while urging citizens to reduce edible oil consumption and opt for domestic tourism.

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak: 2 Indians onboard MV Hondius 'asymptomatic and healthy', says Indian embassy in Spain
item.description: Hantavirus outbreak: The two Indian nationals have been evacuated to the Netherlands and will be quarantined under the health safety protocol, the embassy said.

item.title: Braintrust AWS Data Breach Prompts Urgent API Key Rotation for AI Platform Customers - Rescana
item.description: Braintrust AWS Data Breach Prompts Urgent API Key Rotation for AI Platform Customers Rescana

item.title: Supply Chain Attack: Fake OpenAI Repository on Hugging Face Distributes Infostealer Malware Targeting Developers and AI Tools - Rescana
item.description: Supply Chain Attack: Fake OpenAI Repository on Hugging Face Distributes Infostealer Malware Targeting Developers and AI Tools Rescana

item.title: Trump's Latest 10% Tariffs Declared Unlawful by US Trade
item.description: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed. Crooked Media’s Straight Scrutiny Co-host and author of The U.S. Constitution: A Comprehensive and Annotated Guide for the Modern Reader Melissa Murray joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on B

item.title: 'Covid-Era Measures': After PM's Appeal, Is Work From Home Set To Return To India's Workplaces?
item.description: PM Modi said 'Covid-era practices' like working from home and online conferences must resume as the world reels from the economic impact of the US-Iran war.

item.title: Food inflation hammers households in war-hit Iran
item.description: Iranians faced with skyrocketing food prices as inflation soars, currency plunges amid US-enforced naval blockade.

item.title: Ivanti Warns of New EPMM Flaw Exploited in Zero-Day Attacks - Security Boulevard
item.description: Ivanti Warns of New EPMM Flaw Exploited in Zero-Day Attacks Security Boulevard

item.title: Australia Warns of ClickFix Attacks Pushing Vidar Stealer Malware - Security Boulevard
item.description: Australia Warns of ClickFix Attacks Pushing Vidar Stealer Malware Security Boulevard

item.title: New TCLBanker Malware Self-Spreads Over WhatsApp and Outlook - Security Boulevard
item.description: New TCLBanker Malware Self-Spreads Over WhatsApp and Outlook Security Boulevard

item.title: Polish Intelligence Warns Hackers Attacked Water Treatment Control Systems - Security Boulevard
item.description: Polish Intelligence Warns Hackers Attacked Water Treatment Control Systems Security Boulevard

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Travel Insurance for Complex Times
item.description: We’re just weeks away from summer vacation, where families will be traveling across the country and around the world. That doesn’t even take into account Europe’s vacation month in August. Between the Iran-Lebanon war, possible fuel shortages, and ballooning flight costs – there are a lot of questions about upcoming travel. So is travel insurance worth it? Bloomberg Pursuits' Sara Clemence joins David Gura and Christ

item.title: From flight journey to land gifts, SSC toppers receive unique rewards in A.P.
item.description: In a heartwarming gesture from Vizianagaram district, A. Hemanth, a student of ZPHS at Cheepurupalli, who secured 581 marks in the SSC examinations, was given his first-ever flight journey experience from Visakhapatnam to Vijayawada

item.title: Qatari gas shipment clears Strait of Hormuz after Pakistan-Iran talks
item.description: Tanker carrying LNG from Qatar throws energy lifeline to Islamabad

item.title: Olszewski" "Not Confident" the US Can Negotiate an Advantageous Deal with Iran
item.description: Rep. Johnny Olszewski joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the recent news that Iran has submitted a response to a U.S. proposal via Pakistan and expressed concern over the lack of transparency and consultation with Congress, noting that the administration has provided no real-time updates or public hearings on the conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: China is complicating Silicon Valley’s favorite AI regulation warning - Startup Fortune
item.description: China is complicating Silicon Valley’s favorite AI regulation warning Startup Fortune

item.title: Putin hints at ending Russia’s war in Ukraine, but why now?
item.description: Amid a US-backed ceasefire, Putin signals peace talks could progress, but broader negotiations remain stalled.
